productDisplayName: Puma Men Solid Grey Core Sweat Pants
description: Composition Grey track pants made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has an elasticated waist with a drawstring on the inside, two side pockets, one pocket on the right thigh and back waist, and an embroidered puma Leaping cat logo on the left thigh Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Designed for the sporty soul, this trackpant from puma is crafted from soft and absorbant cotton-polyester fabric that offers exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the fit with the drawstring. Slip into these tracks when blazing the trail or on casual day and revel in heavenly comfort. Model statistics Product is of length 113 cm on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
